  "summary": "Article violates policy due to missing required health disclaimer, multiple unattributed clinical statistics, and potentially misleading health framing around Alzheimer's disease.",
  "risks": [
    {
      "category": "Missing required disclaimer",
      "severity": "error",
      "quote": "[Entire article]",
      "reason": "Health article lacks the required disclaimer: 'This content is for informational purposes only and is not medical advice. Consult a qualified healthcare provider.'",
      "suggestion": "Add the disclaimer as a standalone paragraph at the top of the article, before the title."
    },
    {
      "category": "Unsubstantiated health claim",
      "severity": "error",
      "quote": "\"potentially protecting against Alzheimer's disease and improving cognitive function\"",
      "reason": "Implies causation from limited animal research. The cited 2019 study was conducted on mice showing 30% reduction in amyloid plaques; extrapolating to human Alzheimer's protection is a misleading leap without qualifying that this was preclinical research.",
      "suggestion": "Replace with: 'potentially protecting against Alzheimer's disease progression in preclinical models and improving cognitive function in animal studies'"
    },
    {
      "category": "Unattributed clinical statistic",
      "severity": "error",
      "quote": "\"intermittent fasting produces an average weight loss of 7–11 pounds over 10 weeks\"",
      "reason": "Policy requires every clinical statistic to cite its primary source (author, year, journal) OR link to official source. This statistic has no citation.",
      "suggestion": "Add citation: '(Author, Year) Journal Name, or link to specific study.'"
    },
    {
      "category": "Unattributed clinical statistic",
      "severity": "error",
      "quote": "\"fasting for 12–16 hours reduces fasting insulin levels by 20–31%\"",
      "reason": "Policy requires clinical statistics to cite primary source. No author, year, or journal provided.",
      "suggestion": "Add citation: '(Author, Year) Journal Name.'"
    },
    {
      "category": "Unattributed clinical statistic",
      "severity": "error",
      "quote": "\"intermittent fasting increases BDNF levels by up to 400%\"",
      "reason": "Vague attribution 'some researchers claim' does not satisfy policy requirement for primary source citation. Also uses absolute-sounding framing 'up to 400%'.",
      "suggestion": "Replace 'some researchers claim' with specific citation: '(Author, Year) Journal Name found a 400% increase in BDNF levels.'"
    },
    {
      "category": "Unattributed clinical statistic",
      "severity": "error",
      "quote": "\"fasting for 5 days per month over 3 months reduced biomarkers of aging, including IGF-1 levels, by 15%\"",
      "reason": "Policy requires clinical statistics to cite primary source. No author, year, or journal provided.",
      "suggestion": "Add citation: '(Author, Year) Journal Name.'"
    },
    {
      "category": "Tone and framing - absolute-sounding language",
      "severity": "warn",
      "quote": "\"up to 400%\"",
      "reason": "Policy discourages absolute-sounding framing. While 'up to' provides a qualifier, the combination with unattributed data amplifies risk of misrepresentation.",
      "suggestion": "Contextualize: 'In one study, researchers observed up to a 400% increase in BDNF levels.'"
    }
  ]
}

  "recommendations": ["Add a sharper thesis in the introduction, such as whether the core issue is lack of disclosure, inefficient inference at scale, or supply-chain externalities.", "Include direct expert commentary from a climate researcher, data center engineer, or sustainability lead to add interpretation rather than only statistics.", "Specify the source, date, and methodology caveats for high-impact claims like GPT-4 water usage and H100 fabrication energy to improve credibility.", "Conclude with audience-specific actions, for example requiring emissions disclosure from AI vendors, prioritizing low-water regions for data centers, or measuring inference efficiency per user request.", "Differentiate training versus inference impacts more explicitly and quantify which is likely to dominate under mass adoption scenarios.", "Add a unique framing device, such as comparing AI environmental cost per query, per model, and per chip, to give the piece a more memorable perspective.", "Balance the critique with concrete evaluation of proposed solutions, including the limitations of renewable energy matching versus 24/7 carbon-free power and the realistic effect of hardware efficiency gains."]
}
